title: hieracium racemosum subsp. tenuifolium
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. tenuifolium, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, hawkweed is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and safety.
